name: MicrosoftSqlDeployment
description: Deploy SQL Server, Azure SQL Database, or Azure SQL Managed Instance using DACPAC, SQL scripts, or SQL projects
author: Microsoft Corporation

inputs.name: action
inputs.label: Action
inputs.helpMarkDown: SqlPackage action or SQL script execution. For .sqlproj files, use 'publish' action.

inputs.name: path
inputs.label: Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to .dacpac, .sqlproj, or .sql file. Task detects type automatically based on extension.

inputs.name: connectionString
inputs.label: Connection String
inputs.helpMarkDown: SQL Server connection string. Include server, database, and authentication. Example: Server=myserver.database.windows.net;Database=mydb;User ID=user;Password=$(SqlPassword);Encrypt=True; or Server=myserver.database.windows.net;Database=mydb;Authentication=Active Directory Default;Encrypt=True;

inputs.name: azureSubscription
inputs.label: Azure Subscription
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional. Azure Resource Manager service connection for firewall rule management and service principal token authentication.

inputs.name: publishProfile
inputs.label: Publish Profile
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional. Path to a SqlPackage publish profile (.xml). Values in additionalArguments override profile settings.

inputs.name: additionalArguments
inputs.label: Additional Arguments
inputs.helpMarkDown: Additional arguments for SqlPackage or sqlcmd. For SqlPackage: /p:BlockOnPossibleDataLoss=true /p:DropObjectsNotInSource=false. For sqlcmd: -v VarName=Value

inputs.name: buildArguments
inputs.label: Build Arguments
inputs.helpMarkDown: Additional dotnet build arguments (for .sqlproj files only). Example: -c Release /p:TreatTSqlWarningsAsErrors=true

inputs.name: sqlpackagePath
inputs.label: SqlPackage Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional. Override SqlPackage executable path. If not specified, task discovers SqlPackage via: dotnet tool → DacFramework MSI (Windows) → PATH.

inputs.name: sqlcmdPath
inputs.label: Sqlcmd Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional. Override sqlcmd executable path. If not specified and sqlcmd is not on PATH, task auto-installs go-sqlcmd.

inputs.name: firewallRuleManagement
inputs.label: Firewall Rule Management
inputs.helpMarkDown: Enable automatic firewall rule management. Default: true when azureSubscription is set, false otherwise. Set to false explicitly for private VNet deployments.

outputVariables.name: SqlDeploymentOutputFile
outputVariables.description: Path to generated output file for script, deployReport, driftReport, extract, export actions

messages.SqlPackageNotFound: SqlPackage not found. Install via: dotnet tool install -g microsoft.sqlpackage
messages.SqlCmdInstalling: sqlcmd not found on PATH. Installing go-sqlcmd...
messages.ConnectionSuccessful: Connection successful - no firewall rule needed
messages.AddingFirewallRule: Adding temporary firewall rule for IP: %s
messages.FirewallManagementRequiresAzureSubscript: Firewall rule management requires azureSubscription input
messages.DotnetNotFound: .NET SDK not found. Install via UseDotNet@2 task.
